title: WebMCP Early Preview
desc: New web protocol WebMCP available for early preview in Chrome, sparking discussions on future web capabilities and performance.

title: /e/OS De-Googled Mobile Ecosystem
desc: Complete de-Googled mobile OS promoting privacy-focused web and app development independent of Big Tech services.

title: AI-Written Code in Git Commits
desc: Ongoing debate on whether AI-generated code sessions should be committed to git, reflecting AI's growing role in web dev workflows.

title: Building Video Games in 2025 Without Engines
desc: Guide to creating browser games using modern web tech like WebGPU and Canvas, avoiding heavy engines for lighter experiences.

title: Omni: Open-Source Postgres Workplace Search
desc: Open-source tool for workplace search and chat built on Postgres, suitable for integrating into web applications.
